booking.deposit_accelerated: Up to 100% if Day 1 is within 14 days
booking.balance_deadline_card: No later than 5 days before Day 1
booking.balance_deadline_transfer: No later than 3 days before Day 1 (bank transfer or Wise)
booking.payment_security: SSL-encrypted checkout, PCI DSS-compliant gateway. JVTO never asks for full card numbers, CVV, or banking credentials via chat or email.

on_time.outcome: 100% of booking value converts to JVTO Travel Credit

late.outcome: Booking forfeited up to 100%. Travel Credit and cash refunds generally not provided.

jvto_options: Partial or full cash refund net of non-recoverable expenses

cancellation.health_clearance_denied: If guest is denied health clearance (Ijen), affected components are non-refundable. Costs are pre-committed.

amendment.free_reschedule: One free reschedule ≥48h before Day 1, subject to availability

cancellation.cash_refund_policy: JVTO does not issue cash refunds as standard policy. Cancellations within the approved window receive Travel Credit only.

standard: Private air-conditioned vehicle for all land sectors in confirmed itinerary (fuel, tolls, parking)
Bromo 4WD jeep (when Bromo included) — private, max ±4 guests per jeep
Accommodation (hotel/homestay) for all overnight stays with breakfast
Professional crew (driver-guide or driver + escort guide, per group size)
Entrance tickets and park permits for all confirmed itinerary sites
Ijen safety gear when Ijen included: professional gas mask + trekking poles + mandatory medical check + digital/printed health clearance
Daily bottled mineral water in vehicle for overland sectors
Java-Bali ferry tickets (when crossing listed in itinerary and specified on voucher)
1 × JVTO travel T-shirt per participant for eligible packages
Custom JVTO group T-shirt for groups ≥12 guests in a single booking (when written on voucher)
conditional: Custom group T-shirts (when written on voucher)
Additional hosted meals — dinner before Ijen, lunch after Tumpak Sewu, special dinners (when written on voucher)
Bali hotel/airport transfers beyond standard ferry crossing (when written on voucher)
Early check-in / late check-out (when written on voucher)
Police escort or special convoy for VIP/large groups (subject to availability and regulation; when written on voucher)
inclusions.write_to_bind_rule: Only inclusions listed on the official tour page AND Official E-Voucher / Invoice (PDF) are legally binding.

4_to_9_guests.crew: 1 × professional driver + 1 × escort guide + licensed local site guides

10_to_11_guests.crew: 1 × professional driver + 1 × escort guide + licensed local site guides

bromo_jeep.note: Max ±4 guests per jeep for comfort and safety. Multiple jeeps for larger groups.

room_allocation.standard: 1 room per 2 guests (King or Twin bed)
room_allocation.odd_groups: 1 extra bed in one room for the unpaired guest

foc_group_policy.note: Pax = paying guests only. FOC seats not counted toward threshold. 5% discount at 50+ tier applies to entire group total.

health_screening.wording_rule: CONDITIONAL — never describe as mandatory without referencing BBKSDA SE.1658/KSA.9/2024
approved_phrases: Ijen access rules can require a recent local health certificate.
JVTO coordinates clinic workflow when access rules require it.
Health-certificate screening coordination for Ijen routes when current access rules require it.
Health-screening is required when crater conditions meet BBKSDA SE.1658/KSA.9/2024 threshold.
On routes that include Mount Ijen, JVTO integrates health screening as a practical safety step when BBKSDA rules apply.
health_screening.screening_location: Nurse/doctor visits guest hotel evening before hike (Bondowoso / Banyuwangi area)
process: Nurse/doctor visits guest hotel evening before hike
Vitals recorded: SpO2, blood pressure, resting heart rate, respiratory history
QR-verified surat sehat issued by Dr. Ahmad Irwandanu SIP
Certificate presented at crater gate for BBKSDA QR verification
health_screening.gate_rule: No Valid QR Code = No Crater Zone Access
health_screening.failure_protocol: Climb cancelled for individual (not group). Screening cost non-refundable.

allowed: Hotel room category upgrade (may cost extra)
Optional on-site activities (horse riding at Bromo, trolley ojek at Ijen)
Adjusting meal plans within operational limits
not_offered: Significant route changes altering primary destination sequence

global.reason: Conditional on group size and approval

global.phrase: Tips included / Tipping covered / Service charge included
global.reason: Tips are explicit exclusion per policy pack
